meta.title: Theory Exam Mock Test – Fahrschule Abgefahrn
meta.description: Take your theoretical driving licence mock exam in your language. Class A, B, A+B or Mofa. With power to your licence.

home.headline: Carry out your mock theory exam
home.subheadline: Pick your language and licence class to experience the official German exam format.
home.cinemaSubheadline: The official mock theory exam. Pick a language, pick a class — the rest mirrors TÜV and DEKRA.
home.mascotSpeech: Ready? Let's get you behind the wheel.
home.infoTitle: How does the mock test work?
home.infoBody: Since 2008, the theoretical driving licence test in Germany has been conducted using a uniform system developed by TÜV and DEKRA. Our mock test mirrors that exam format so you can prepare realistically.

A.name: Class A
A.description: Motorcycles – large bikes with no power limit.

B.name: Class B
B.description: Cars up to 3.5 t and up to 8 passenger seats.

AB.name: Class A + B
AB.description: Motorcycle and car combined – the full programme.

quiz.label: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.multiHint: More than one answer can be correct.
quiz.exitConfirm: Do you really want to exit the exam? Your progress will be lost.

results.title: Your result
results.passedSubtitle: Great driving! You passed the mock test.
results.failedSubtitle: Don't give up – review your mistakes and try again.
